sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74333" key="o)cu/nitron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ´-νιτρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n74333.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixture of vinegar and soda,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:5:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
